TCPVirtualServer - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver
This class is the implementation of the VirtualServer interface for the TCP connection.
TCPVirtualServer() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.TCPVirtualServer
 
TCPVirtualView - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview
the TCPVirtualVIew implements the methods of the VirtualView Interface in case the player chooses an RMI connection.
TCPVirtualView(ClientHandler) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.TCPVirtualView
TCPVirtualView is a setter method for the ClientHandler.

TERMINATE message type
Token - Enum Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player
The Token enumeration contains all the possible colours a player can choose.
TOKEN - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
TOKEN message type
TOPLEFT - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.Direction
The TOPLEFT value indicates that we will consider the top left Corner of the Card.
TOPRIGHT - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.Direction
The TOPRIGHT value indicates that we will consider the top left Corner of the Card.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.Card
the toString method prints the id of each card.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.ObjectiveCard
the toString() method is used to debug.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.PlacementBoundObjective
the toString() method is used to debug.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.placeable.GameCard
the toString method prints front and back of the card.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.placeable.StandardCard
the toString method returns front and back of each card.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Back
the toString method is used for debugging and prints the back side of the card and where it's placed.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Corner
the toString method is used for debugging and prints the status of the corner.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Front
the toString method is used for debugging and prints the front side of the card and where it's placed.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Position
the toString method is used for debugging and prints the position of the card.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Side
the toString method is used for debugging and prints a side of the card and where it's placed.

Method that returns the string representation of the message.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization.ChooseTokenMessage
This method is used to print the message.

This method is used to print the message.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby.JoinMessage

This method will return a string representation of the message.

This method will return a string representation of the message.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby.UpdateLobbyMessage
This method will return a string representation of the message.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.Message
Returns a string representation of the message.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed.ErrorMessage
This method will return a string representation of the message.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed.PlaceMessage

This method will return a string representation of the message.
toString() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns.DrawDeckMessage
Method that returns the player that wants to draw a card.
toString(boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.DiagonalDown
the toString method shows the placement of the cards the objective requires.
toString(boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.DiagonalUp
the toString method shows the placement of the cards the objective requires.
toString(boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.LShape
the toString method shows the placement of the cards the objective requires.
toString(boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.ObjectiveCard
the toString() is used to show the objectives to the player.
toString(boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.ResourcesBoundObjective
the toString method shows the amount and type of resources the objective requires.
toString(boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.placeable.GoldCard
the toString method prints the gold card corresponding to the id.
toString(boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.placeable.ResourceCard
the toString method prints the resource card corresponding to the id.
toString(boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.placeable.StandardCard
the toString method is used to show the cards to the player.
toString(boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.placeable.StartCard
the toString method shows to the player his starting card.
TUIView - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI
This class is the text user interface of the game.

Constructor.
TurnsMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization
This message is used to set the order of the players in the game.
